evals.prompt: /m_code_rules_audit Check my current diff before commit.
evals.expected_output: Reads actual rule sources, inspects the diff, runs safe checks, and reports severity-ranked findings with merge readiness.
assertions: Findings include severity, source, evidence, impact, and fix.

evals.prompt: /m_code_rules_audit Check whether src/domain follows architecture rules.
evals.expected_output: Checks actual imports/calls against explicit rules and reports concrete boundary violations.
